title: U.S. Tomahawk Hit Naval Base Beside Iranian School, Video Shows
summary_full: The evidence contradicts President Trump’s claim that Iran was responsible for a strike at the school that killed 175 people, most of them children.
summary_public: The evidence contradicts President Trump’s claim that Iran was responsible for a strike at the school that killed 175 people, most of them children.

IR.label: negative
